{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320155237F31091E4C633A61B41E9"}"},"total":205},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607298251960845080","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常精彩的玄幻小说，听读就像看电影！","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"玄幻小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8E%84%E5%B9%BB%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773993157A61B41E9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607298251960845080%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227578747973325032510%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%84%E5%B9%BB%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771215249,"group_id":"7578747973325032510","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzh2/w7QH1XSKvUUVUbfsuc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"370957498974587","user_name":"上官阁的阿斯特瑞雅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"370957498974587","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578747973325032510","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+系统+开局+多女主+冲师逆徒+高甜无刀+无敌爽+热血+后期被病娇调教】
高考结束后，登临泰山之巅，一览众山小之后的林然正要返程回家时，却有一股妖风刮来，将他推入了万劫不复的深渊。
等他再一睁眼，才发觉自己已然穿越到了人生地不熟的玄幻世界。
经过一阵机缘巧合，他意外成为了飞仙宗九大峰主之一的苏惜月的弟子……
…………
“叮！天命系统已觉醒，请问宿主是否绑定？”
“绑定！”
“叮！恭喜宿主成功绑定天命系统，只要宿主完成相应的任务，便可获得相应的奖励！”
“叮！检测到宿主师尊身受重伤，却还敢对宿主指指点点，简直不可饶恕！现在该轮到宿主对苏惜月指指点点了！”
“任务奖励：命运仙体！”
闻言，林然看向了前方气息虚浮不稳，面色羞红，却还在激情说教自己的苏惜月，嘴角也是勾起了一抹邪笑。
“好师尊，若您修为还在，说教徒儿理所当然。可您现在修为不复，却还敢如此说教徒儿，不得不说，师尊的勇气的确可嘉！桀桀桀！”
“啊！！！逆徒！我要杀了你！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/22bf8adbf362ff453c41910162e110f2","author":"一只小笨猪啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7578747973325032510","book_name":"系统：冲师成功，奖励大道仙体！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#8078b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579124459877958206","read_count":"32421","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"589804"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"288","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ef9ad40078647703bd2d478b5177a5b4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177157&x-signature=D9e%2BUauqFCpP0FMCMqTilLgWRs0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"86371818185","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320155237F31091E4C633A61B41E9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duratio
